en: Hi, I'm looking for Eddie Manoa.
He's not here right now.
I'm Chandler.
Can I take a message, or a fish tank?
Come on in.
I'm Tilly.
Oh, he told you about me?
Yeah, your name came up in a conversation that terrified me to my very soul.
ko: 응, 네 이름이 대화 중에 나왔는데, 내 영혼을 깊이 두렵게 했어.

en: He's kind of intense, huh?
Yes. Hey, can I ask you, is Eddie a little...
A little what? A bit country? Come on in here, you roomie.
ko: 좀 뭐? 시골 느낌이야? 들어와, 룸메이트.

en: Whoa, Tilly!
ko: 와, 틸리! 에디, 나는 네 탱크를 가져오려고 왔어. 정말 배려가 깊네.

en: Eddie, I just came by to drop off your tank.
Very thoughtful of you.
It's very thoughtful.
Okay then, I'm gonna go.
Bye-bye. Bye-bye.
So, we get in the fish...
You went and had sex with her, didn't you?
Eddie, I didn't sleep with your ex-girlfriend.
ko: 에디, 나는 네 전 여자친구와 자지 않았어.

en: That's very interesting.
You know, because that's exactly what someone who slept with her would say.
ko: 그게 바로 그녀와 잔 사람이 할 말이야.

en: This is crazy. She came over for like two minutes,
ko: 이건 미친 짓이야. 그녀는 2분 정도 와서

en: dropped off the fish tank, and left.
End of story.
Where's Buddy?
Buddy? There was no fish when she dropped it off.
ko: 버디? 그녀가 탱크를 놓고 갔을 때 물고기가 없었어.

en: This is unbelievable.
You sleep with my ex-girlfriend, then you insult my intelligence by lying about it,
ko: 내 전 여자친구와 자고, 그걸 거짓말로 나를 속이다니,

en: and then you kill my fish, my Buddy!
ko: 그리고 내 물고기를 죽였다고, 내 버디를!

en: I didn't kill your fish!
ko: 너의 물고기 안 죽였어! 봐, 에디, 내가 여기서 뭘 하고 있는 거지? 이건 똑똑하지 않아.

en: Look, Eddie, would you look at what I'm doing here now?
That can't be smart.
So we're just gonna take this guy, right?
ko: 그래서 우리는 이 친구를 데려갈 거야, 맞지?

en: Can jello?
